taskTemplate.name: Confirm Funding
taskTemplate.description: Confirm funding is ready by adding the funding worksheet and marking the confirm funding amount in the system

subTaskTemplate.name: Add Funding Worksheet to eFolder
subTaskTemplate.description: Add Funding Worksheet to eFolder – Add the funding worksheet to the eFolder; this subtask auto-completes when the funding worksheet is received.
subTaskTemplate.type: Confirm Funding – Add Funding Worksheet to eFolder

subTaskTemplate.name: Confirm Funding Amount
subTaskTemplate.description: Confirm Funding Amount – Mark the confirm funding amount in the system; this subtask auto-completes when the Confirm Funding button is pushed in the system.
